title: Presence status display and own status set
description:
## Why
Presence is a visible and settable part of the JMAP Chat experience.

## What
- Display contact presence dot in chat list (online=green, away=yellow, busy=red, offline=grey, absent=grey)
- Display contact statusText and statusEmoji in contact tooltips or chat header
- Fetch own PresenceStatus on startup
- Allow setting own presence via a status menu (online/away/busy/offline)
- Call PresenceStatus/set when status changes
close_reason: Superseded; replaced by issues under jmap-chat-tui-s2e (egui) and new TUI epic
